texto: He turns off the techno-shit in his goggles. All it does is confuse him
autor: he stands there reading statistics about his own death even as it's happening to him. Very post-modern.

All it does is confuse him” articula reflexao, neal-stephenson, snow-crash em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como snow-crash.
